description: ::before/::after generated content: styled required-field asterisks (::after on inline elements), a ::before badge with letter-spacing, attr(href) printed after links, CSS hex escapes (curly quotes and the section sign), legacy single-colon :before, and content:none / unsupported counter() generating nothing.
visual_assertions: Red bold asterisks follow the two required field names (::after on spans).
A small green letter-spaced NEW precedes the badge paragraph.
The link is followed by its href in small gray parentheses (attr()).
The h3 starts with a blue section sign from the legacy :before form.
18pt curly quotes from hex escapes wrap the quote sentence.
The content:none and counter() paragraphs generate nothing.
